title: Past perfect continuous (I had been doing)

data.en: Yesterday morning I got up and looked out of the window.
data.cn: 昨天早上我起床并朝窗外看去。
data.hint: 描写过去发生的连续动作，均使用一般过去时 got up 和 looked。

data.en: The sun was shining, but the ground was very wet.
data.cn: 阳光普照，但地面非常潮湿。
data.hint: 用过去进行时 was shining 表示当时正在发生的动作，用 was 表示当时的状态。

data.en: It had been raining.
data.cn: 刚才一直在下雨。
data.hint: 地湿是结果，下雨这一动作持续发生在此前，使用过去完成进行时 had been raining。

data.en: It was not raining when I looked out of the window.
data.cn: 当我朝窗外看时，天没有在下雨。
data.hint: 表示过去某一时刻正在发生的否定动作，用过去进行时否定 was not raining。
accept: It wasn't raining when I looked out of the window.

data.en: The sun was shining.
data.cn: 阳光当时正照耀着。
data.hint: 表示过去某一特定时刻正在进行的动作，用过去进行时 was shining。

data.en: But it had been raining before.
data.cn: 但在此之前一直在下雨。
data.hint: 使用过去完成进行时 had been raining 表示在过去某个时间点之前持续进行的动作。

data.en: My hands were dirty because I'd been repairing my bike.
data.cn: 我的手很脏，因为我刚才一直在修理我的自行车。
data.hint: 手脏（were dirty）是过去的状态，修理车是之前一直持续的动作，用过去完成进行时 I'd been repairing。
accept: My hands were dirty because I had been repairing my bike.

data.en: Tom was tired when he got home.
data.cn: 汤姆到家时很累。
data.hint: 描写过去时间点（got home）的状态（was tired），用一般过去时。

data.en: He'd been working hard all day.
data.cn: 他一整天都在辛苦工作。
data.hint: 工作持续了一整天且发生在他回家累了之前，用过去完成进行时 He'd been working。
accept: He had been working hard all day.

data.en: I went to Madrid a few years ago and stayed with a friend of mine.
data.cn: 几年前我去马德里，住在一个朋友家里。
data.hint: a few years ago 指过去，用过去式 went 和 stayed 表达连贯动作。

data.en: She hadn't been living there very long, but she knew the city very well.
data.cn: 她在那儿住的时间并不长，但她对那座城市非常熟悉。
data.hint: 居住动作持续进行至过去的时间点，用过去完成进行时否定 hadn't been living。熟悉用过去式 knew。
accept: She had not been living there very long, but she knew the city very well.

data.en: We'd been playing tennis for about half an hour when it started to rain heavily.
data.cn: 我们打了大约半小时网球，这时天开始下起了大雨。
data.hint: 打网球的动作发生在下大雨（started to rain）之前并持续了半小时，用过去完成进行时 We'd been playing。
accept: We had been playing tennis for about half an hour when it started to rain heavily.

data.en: I hope the bus comes soon.
data.cn: 我希望公车快点来。
data.hint: 现在的期望用一般现在时 hope 和 comes。

data.en: I've been waiting for 20 minutes.
data.cn: 我等了二十分钟了（说话时仍在等）。
data.hint: 从过去开始等一直持续到现在，用现在完成进行时 I've been waiting。
accept: I have been waiting for 20 minutes.

data.en: James is out of breath.
data.cn: 詹姆斯气喘吁吁。
data.hint: 描述现在的状态，用一般现在时 is。

data.en: He's been running.
data.cn: 他刚才一直在跑步。
data.hint: 由于刚刚持续跑步导致现在气喘，用现在完成进行时 He's been running。
accept: He has been running.

data.en: At last the bus came.
data.cn: 公交车终于来了。
data.hint: 描述过去发生的动作，用一般过去时 came。

data.en: I'd been waiting for 20 minutes.
data.cn: 我当时已经等了20分钟了。
data.hint: 在公交车来（came）这个过去时刻之前持续等待，用过去完成进行时 I'd been waiting。
accept: I had been waiting for 20 minutes.

data.en: James was out of breath.
data.cn: 詹姆斯当时气喘吁吁。
data.hint: 描述过去某时刻的状态，用一般过去时 was。

data.en: He'd been running.
data.cn: 他当时一直在跑步。
data.hint: 在他当时气喘（was out of breath）之前一直在跑，用过去完成进行时 He'd been running。
accept: He had been running.

data.en: It wasn't raining when we went out.
data.cn: 我们出门时天没有在下雨。
data.hint: 表示过去出门（went out）时动作没有正在发生，用过去进行时否定形式 wasn't raining。
accept: It was not raining when we went out.

data.en: Katherine was lying on the sofa.
data.cn: 凯瑟琳当时正躺在沙发上。
data.hint: 描写过去某个时刻正在进行的状态，用过去进行时 was lying。

data.en: She was tired because she'd been working hard.
data.cn: 她很累，因为她刚才一直在辛苦工作。
data.hint: 累（was tired）是过去状态，工作是此前持续进行的动作，用过去完成进行时 she'd been working。
accept: She was tired because she had been working hard.

data.en: The children came into the house.
data.cn: 孩子们进到了屋里。
data.hint: 描写过去完成的简单动作，用一般过去时 came。

data.en: They had a football and they were both very tired.
data.cn: 他们拿着一个足球，两个人都非常累。
data.hint: 用一般过去时 had 和 were 描述孩子们进屋时的状态。

data.en: They'd been playing football.
data.cn: 他们刚刚一直在踢足球。
data.hint: 踢足球是造成他们非常累（were tired）之前的持续动作，用过去完成进行时 They'd been playing。
accept: They had been playing football.

data.en: I was disappointed when I had to cancel my holiday.
data.cn: 当我不得不取消假期时，我很失望。
data.hint: 描述过去的一般事实，用一般过去时 was 和 had to。

data.en: I'd been looking forward to it.
data.cn: 我在此之前一直很期待它。
data.hint: 在假期取消之前，我一直期待着，用过去完成进行时 I'd been looking forward to。
accept: I had been looking forward to it.

data.en: Anna woke up in the middle of the night.
data.cn: 安娜在半夜醒来。
data.hint: 描述过去瞬间发生的动作，用一般过去时 woke up。

data.en: She was frightened and didn't know where she was.
data.cn: 她吓坏了，不知道自己在哪里。
data.hint: 描述她醒来时的状态，用一般过去时 was，didn't know 和 was。
accept: She was frightened and did not know where she was.

data.en: She'd been having a bad dream.
data.cn: 她刚才一直在做噩梦。
data.hint: 做梦是醒来并感到害怕之前持续的过程，用过去完成进行时 She'd been having。
accept: She had been having a bad dream.

data.en: When I got home, Mark was sitting in front of the TV.
data.cn: 当我回到家时，马克正坐在电视机前。
data.hint: 我到家时马克正坐着，用一般过去时 got home 结合过去进行时 was sitting。

data.en: He had just turned it off.
data.cn: 他刚刚把电视关掉。
data.hint: 关电视发生在我到家前的一瞬间，用过去完成时 had just turned off。

data.en: He'd been watching a film.
data.cn: 他刚才一直在看一部电影。
data.hint: 看电影是关掉电视机前持续的活动，用过去完成进行时 He'd been watching。
accept: He had been watching a film.

data.en: The people waiting at the bus stop were getting impatient.
data.cn: 在公交站等车的人正变得越来越不耐烦。
data.hint: 表示过去正在发生的逐渐变化，用过去进行时 were getting。

data.en: The bus was very late.
data.cn: 公交车迟到了很久。
data.hint: 用一般过去时 was 描写状态。

data.en: They'd been waiting a long time.
data.cn: 他们当时已经等了很久了。
data.hint: 在开始变得不耐烦之前一直持续等待，用过去完成进行时 They'd been waiting。
accept: They had been waiting a long time.

data.en: I realised that I'd been waiting for 20 minutes when I was in the wrong restaurant.
data.cn: 我意识到自己已经等了20分钟了，而我进错了餐厅。
data.hint: 意识到和处于错餐厅是过去，在这之前等待了20分钟，用过去完成进行时 I'd been waiting。
accept: I realised that I had been waiting for 20 minutes when I was in the wrong restaurant.

data.en: At the time the company went out of business, Sarah had been working there for twelve years.
data.cn: 在公司倒闭时，萨拉已经在那儿工作了十二年了。
data.hint: 公司倒闭是过去（went），在这之前她在那儿工作了12年，用过去完成进行时 had been working。

data.en: The orchestra had been playing for about ten minutes when a man in the audience suddenly started shouting.
data.cn: 乐队演奏了大约十分钟时，观众席上的一个男人突然开始大喊大叫。
data.hint: 大叫（started）是过去，在这之前乐队演奏了10分钟，用过去完成进行时 had been playing。

data.en: We were good friends.
data.cn: 我们当时是好朋友。
data.hint: 表示过去的状态用一般过去时 were。

data.en: We had known each other for years.
data.cn: 我们认识彼此很多年了。
data.hint: know 是非延续性/静态动词，不能用于进行时，因此用过去完成时 had known，不能用 had been knowing。

data.en: A few years ago Lisa cut her hair really short.
data.cn: 几年前，莉萨把头发剪得非常短。
data.hint: 描写过去完成的独立事件，用一般过去时 cut（过去式仍是 cut）。

data.en: I was surprised because she'd always had long hair.
data.cn: 我很惊讶，因为她以前一直留着长发。
data.hint: have 表示“占有/有”时是静态动词，不用进行时。之前有长发用过去完成时 she'd always had。
accept: I was surprised because she had always had long hair.

data.en: It was noisy next door last night.
data.cn: 昨晚隔壁很吵闹。
data.hint: last night 指过去的时间，用一般过去时 was。

data.en: Our neighbours were having a party.
data.cn: 我们的邻居们当时正在举办派对。
data.hint: have a party 表示动作/活动，可用进行时。描述昨晚正在发生，用过去进行时 were having。

data.en: At the end of our journey we were extremely tired.
data.cn: 在旅程结束时，我们极其疲惫。
data.hint: tired 是形容词，描述过去的状态用一般过去时 were。

data.en: We'd been travelling for more than 24 hours.
data.cn: 我们当时已经旅行了24个多小时。
data.hint: 旅行这一动作持续进行至过去感觉疲惫的时间点，用过去完成进行时 We'd been travelling（双写 l）。
accept: We had been travelling for more than 24 hours.

data.en: James was on his hands and knees on the floor.
data.cn: 詹姆斯当时正跪趴在地上（双手和膝盖着地）。
data.hint: 描述过去他处于的姿势状态，用一般过去时 was。

data.en: He was looking for his contact lens.
data.cn: 他当时正在寻找他的隐形眼镜。
data.hint: 描写过去那一时刻正在进行的活动，用过去进行时 was looking for。
